---
title: "Untitled"
format: html
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
```

```{r}
# Ensure the tidyverse package is loaded
library(tidyverse)

# Create an interactive-feeling static visualization using the mpg dataset
ggplot(data = mpg, aes(x = displ, y = hwy, color = class)) +
  # Add points with some jitter and transparency to reduce overlapping
  geom_jitter(size = 3, alpha = 0.7, width = 0.1, height = 0.1) +
  # Add a smooth trend line to show the overall relationship
  geom_smooth(aes(group = 1), method = "loess", color = "gray30", se = FALSE, linetype = "dashed") +
  # Apply a clean, modern minimal theme
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  # Customize colors using a distinct palette
  scale_color_viridis_d(option = "plasma") +
  # Add clear, descriptive labels
  labs(
    title = "Engine Displacement vs. Highway Fuel Efficiency",
    subtitle = "Larger engines generally yield lower MPG, varying significantly by vehicle class",
    x = "Engine Displacement (Liters)",
    y = "Highway Miles per Gallon (MPG)",
    color = "Vehicle Class",
    caption = "Data Source: EPA (mpg dataset)"
  ) +
  # Fine-tune theme details for presentation
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 16),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(color = "gray40", margin = margin(b = 15)),
    legend.position = "right",
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  )
```
